title: The RoosInc Attorneys 'My perfect legacy' journey
description: BUSINESS NEWS - Over the past several weeks...
bodyText:
Sponsored Content

BUSINESS NEWS - Over the past several weeks of our 10-week Eden FM series, we have taken our readers and listeners through every section of the ‘My Perfect Legacy’ File - a structured, practical guide designed to bring order, clarity, and peace to your personal and financial affairs.

There is a quiet satisfaction in order and discipline.

If you missed any part of the series, don’t worry.

You can:

- Listen to each week’s podcast on Eden FM’s website
- Visit www.roosinc.co.za to view the file contents and discover more about the ‘My Perfect Legacy’ concept.


## Win a ‘My Perfect Legacy’ file


Eight lucky people will each receive:

- A ‘My Perfect Legacy’ File, and
- A personal consultation with Alta Roos and Chane van Zyl to guide you in building and completing your file.


## How to enter


Send the answer to the following question to the Eden FM WhatsApp number: 060 505 2693


> Question:


Alta Roos (director and founder of RoosInc) and Chane van Zyl (Alta’s former candidate attorney, now an admitted attorney and RoosInc’s fiduciary attorney) studied at the same university, years apart.

Which university is it?


## Winners announcement


Winners will be announced on Eden FM during their Afternoon Drive show on 2 December, the final day of our 10-week ‘My Perfect Legacy’ journey.

They will also be announced on the RoosInc Facebook page.


## Roosinc Prokureurs – ‘My Perfekte Nalatenskap’-reis


Oor die afgelope paar weke van ons 10-weke Eden FM-reeks het ons ons lesers en luisteraars deur elke afdeling van die ‘My Perfekte Nalatenskap’-lêer geneem - ’n gestruktureerde, praktiese gids om orde, duidelikheid en gemoedsrus in jou persoonlike en finansiële sake te bring.

Daar is ‘n stille tevredenheid in orde en disipline.

Indien jy enige week gemis het, moenie bekommerd wees nie.

Jy kan:

- Na elke week se potgooi op Eden FM se webtuiste luister
- www.roosinc.co.za besoek om die lêerinhoud te sien en meer te leer oor die ‘My Perfekte Nalatenskap’-konsep.


## Wen ‘n ‘My Perfekte Nalatenskap’-lêer


Agt gelukkige persone sal elk die volgende ontvang:

- ’n ‘My Perfekte Nalatenskap’-lêer, en
- ’n persoonlike konsultasie met Alta Roos en Chane van Zyl om jou te help om jou lêer te bou en te voltooi.


## Hoe om in te skryf


Stuur die antwoord op die volgende vraag na die Eden FM WhatsApp-nommer: 060 505 2693


> Vraag:


Alta Roos (direkteur en stigter van RoosInc) en Chane van Zyl (voorheen Alta se kandidaatprokureur, nou ’n toegelate prokureur en RoosInc se fidusiêre prokureur) het aan dieselfde universiteit gestudeer - jare uit mekaar.

Watter universiteit is dit?


## Wenneraankondiging


Wenners sal op 2 Desember tydens Eden FM se program “Afternoon Drive” aangekondig word, op die laaste dag van ons 10-weke My Perfekte Nalatenskap’-reis.

Die aankondiging sal ook op die RoosInc Facebook-blad verskyn.

Vorige artikels:

- Come sit at my table - week 9
- Come sit at my table - week 8
- Episode 7 of Come sit at my table
- Come sit at my table - Week 6: Building your "In Loving Order" file
- Come sit at my table - Week 5
- Episode 4 van Kom sit aan my tafel - 'n reis na 'n nalatenskap van liefdevolle orde
- Episode 3 of Come sit at my table - A journey to a legacy of loving order
- Come sit at my table - A journey to a legacy of loving order
- Kom sit aan my tafel: 'n Reis na 'n nalatenskap van orde

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
